body.title: Close behavior→milieu feedback loop: action outcome updates affect state
body.result: After each habit execution in main.py, outcome feeds back via EmotionalMilieuChannel: error result → arousal +0.08 + valence -0.05 + negative interpretive edge (FAIL_id, weight=-0.3); success → dominance +0.03. Closes the behavior→milieu loop: Igor's emotional state now reflects past action outcomes, modulating future habit selection.
body.description: milieu modulates habit thresholds (BG reads arousal/valence) but action execution outcome NEVER feeds back into milieu. Liveness finding #1 from deep-audit Panels 3+10. Fix: when a habit executes and produces a result, route outcome confidence/error back to milieu via EmotionalMilieuChannel. Specifically: (1) successful code execution → small dominance boost; (2) error result → arousal spike + valence dip; (3) high-surprise outcome → arousal boost. Wire from habit dispatch path in main.py after habit execution completes. Also: add post-execution negative interpretive edge on failure (weight=-0.3 from habit to failure node).
